# `literature_hvs_candidates.json` Schema

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_schema_docs.py; do not edit by hand. -->

`literature_hvs_candidates.json` is the Agent-filled paper-level HVS/unbound candidate fact source. Generate a skeleton from code, then fill candidate semantics and provenance.

Use `schema_version: "stella.literature_hvs_candidates.v6"`.

## Required Top-Level Fields

- `schema_version`
- `generated_at`
- `paper`
- `inputs`
- `extraction`
- `method_chain`
- `candidates`
- `candidate_groups_considered`

## Top-Level Shape

```json
{
  "schema_version": "stella.literature_hvs_candidates.v6",
  "generated_at": "",
  "paper": {},
  "inputs": {},
  "extraction": {},
  "method_chain": [],
  "candidates": [],
  "candidate_groups_considered": []
}
```

## Enum Values

- `ambiguous`
- `astrometric_calibration`
- `candidate_classification`
- `candidates_found`
- `cited_from_literature`
- `cross_match`
- `decimal_degrees`
- `distance_estimation`
- `ecsv_cell`
- `equinox`
- `escape_or_bound_assessment`
- `escaping_galaxy_candidate`
- `follow_up_validation`
- `galactic_potential_model`
- `hvs_candidate`
- `hyper_runaway_candidate`
- `input_catalog`
- `introduced_by_this_paper`
- `needs_review`
- `no_candidates`
- `not_reported`
- `orbit_integration`
- `origin_assessment`
- `other`
- `partial`
- `photometric_or_sed_modeling`
- `quality_filter`
- `radial_velocity_measurement`
- `reference_epoch`
- `reported_value_adoption`
- `sample_selection`
- `sexagesimal_colon`
- `sexagesimal_dms`
- `sexagesimal_hms`
- `source_missing`
- `stella.literature_hvs_candidates.v6`
- `stellar_parameter_inference`
- `text`
- `unbound_candidate`
- `velocity_calculation`

## Workflow Notes

- Generate a skeleton with `scripts/init_hvs_candidates.py --arxiv-id <arxiv_id>` after review and extraction exist.
- Candidate inclusion is driven by paper text, not by tables alone.
- Use `scripts/validate_hvs_candidates.py --require-complete` for final Agent-filled output; plain validation only checks structural skeleton validity.
- Every quantity must preserve `raw_value`, cleaned `value`, source references, and exactly one direct-producer `method_refs` entry when complete.
- Candidate identifiers live under `identifiers`: `record_id` is the internal `<arxiv_id>:cand-001` record key, `paper_candidate_id` is the paper display name, `gaia_source_id` is the strict Gaia machine id or empty string, and `all[]` stores paper-visible names with source refs.
- For numeric core fields and quantitative `extra[]` records, `value`, `error`, `lower_error`, and `upper_error` should be single plain numbers; ranges, limits, units, notes, and LaTeX residue stay in `raw_value`/`description`.
- Core probability fields normalize `value` to a unitless 0-1 fraction and leave `unit` empty; paper percent values remain in `raw_value` and source refs.
- RA/Dec are coordinate records: keep each coordinate component in `raw_value`/`value`, put frame and epoch context in the nested `reference_frame` and `epoch` objects, and use `component_raw_value` when one ECSV cell contains both components.
- `method_chain[]` uses local `step-XX` ids, canonical `step_type` values, and `depends_on[]` to encode upstream method lineage.
- Full quantity provenance is the direct `method_refs` step plus recursive `depends_on[]` ancestors; candidates do not carry paper-level `method_chain_refs`.
- The standard `core` groups are `observed_phase_space`, `derived_kinematics`, and `probabilities`; paper-specific fields go in `extra[]`.

## JSON Schema

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "CandidateAssessment": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "summary": {
          "title": "Summary",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "candidate_status": {
          "enum": [
            "hvs_candidate",
            "unbound_candidate",
            "hyper_runaway_candidate",
            "escaping_galaxy_candidate"
          ],
          "title": "Candidate Status",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "confidence": {
          "title": "Confidence",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_refs": {
          "items": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/TextSourceRef"
              },
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/EcsvCellSourceRef"
              }
            ]
          },
          "title": "Source Refs",
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "summary",
        "candidate_status",
        "confidence",
        "source_refs"
      ],
      "title": "CandidateAssessment",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "CandidateCitation": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "bibkey": {
          "title": "Bibkey",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "title": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Title",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "year": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Year",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "authors": {
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "title": "Authors",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "bibcode": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Bibcode",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "doi": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Doi",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "arxiv_id": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Arxiv Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_refs": {
          "items": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/TextSourceRef"
              },
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/EcsvCellSourceRef"
              }
            ]
          },
          "title": "Source Refs",
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "bibkey",
        "source_refs"
      ],
      "title": "CandidateCitation",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "CandidateCore": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "observed_phase_space": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/ObservedPhaseSpace"
        },
        "derived_kinematics": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/DerivedKinematics"
        },
        "probabilities": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/Probabilities"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "observed_phase_space",
        "derived_kinematics",
        "probabilities"
      ],
      "title": "CandidateCore",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "CandidateGroupConsidered": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "group_id": {
          "title": "Group Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "description": {
          "title": "Description",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "decision": {
          "title": "Decision",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "reason": {
          "title": "Reason",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_refs": {
          "items": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/TextSourceRef"
              },
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/EcsvCellSourceRef"
              }
            ]
          },
          "title": "Source Refs",
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "group_id",
        "description",
        "decision",
        "reason",
        "source_refs"
      ],
      "title": "CandidateGroupConsidered",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "CandidateIdentifiers": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "record_id": {
          "title": "Record Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "paper_candidate_id": {
          "title": "Paper Candidate Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "gaia_source_id": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Gaia Source Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "all": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/IdentifierRecord"
          },
          "title": "All",
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "record_id",

      ],
      "title": "CandidateIdentifiers",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "CandidateOrigin": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "origin_type": {
          "enum": [

          "title": "Origin Type",

        },
        "paper_reassesses_unbound_status": {
          "title": "Paper Reassesses Unbound Status",
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "source_refs": {
          "items": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/TextSourceRef"
              },
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/EcsvCellSourceRef"
              }
            ]
          },
          "title": "Source Refs",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "citation": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/CandidateCitation"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "origin_type",
        "paper_reassesses_unbound_status",
        "source_refs"
      ],
      "title": "CandidateOrigin",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "CandidateRecord": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "identifiers": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/CandidateIdentifiers"
        },
        "candidate_assessment": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/CandidateAssessment"
        },

        },

        },
        "extra": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/ExtraQuantityRecord"
          },
          "title": "Extra",
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "identifiers",
        "candidate_assessment",

        "core",
        "extra"
      ],
      "title": "CandidateRecord",
      "type": "object"
    },

          "default": "",
          "title": "Abs",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "pdf": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Pdf",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "title": "LinkSet",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "MethodStep": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "pattern": "^step-\\d{2}$",
          "title": "Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "depends_on": {
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "title": "Depends On",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "step_type": {
          "enum": [
            "input_catalog",
            "sample_selection",
            "cross_match",
            "quality_filter",
            "astrometric_calibration",
            "distance_estimation",
            "radial_velocity_measurement",
            "stellar_parameter_inference",
            "photometric_or_sed_modeling",
            "velocity_calculation",
            "galactic_potential_model",
            "escape_or_bound_assessment",
            "orbit_integration",
            "origin_assessment",
            "candidate_classification",
            "follow_up_validation",
            "reported_value_adoption",
            "other"
          ],
          "title": "Step Type",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "summary": {
          "title": "Summary",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "inputs": {
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "title": "Inputs",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "outputs": {
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "title": "Outputs",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "source_refs": {
          "items": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/TextSourceRef"
              },
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/EcsvCellSourceRef"
              }
            ]
          },
          "title": "Source Refs",
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "id",
        "depends_on",
        "step_type",
        "summary"
      ],
      "title": "MethodStep",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ObservedPhaseSpace": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "ra": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/CoordinateQuantityRecord"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        },
        "dec": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/CoordinateQuantityRecord"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        },
        "distance": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/QuantityRecord"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        },
        "parallax": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/QuantityRecord"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        },
        "proper_motion_ra": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/QuantityRecord"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        },
        "proper_motion_dec": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/QuantityRecord"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        },
        "radial_velocity": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/QuantityRecord"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        }
      },
      "title": "ObservedPhaseSpace",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "Probabilities": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "bound_probability": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/QuantityRecord"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        },
        "unbound_probability": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/QuantityRecord"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        },
        "classification_probability": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/QuantityRecord"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null
        }
      },
      "title": "Probabilities",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "QuantityRecord": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "raw_value": {
          "title": "Raw Value",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "value": {
          "title": "Value",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "error": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Error",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "lower_error": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Lower Error",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "upper_error": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Upper Error",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "unit": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Unit",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "kind": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Kind",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "description": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Description",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_refs": {
          "items": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/TextSourceRef"
              },
              {
                "$ref": "#/$defs/EcsvCellSourceRef"
              }
            ]
          },
          "title": "Source Refs",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "method_refs": {
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "title": "Method Refs",
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "raw_value",
        "value",
        "source_refs",
        "method_refs"
      ],
      "title": "QuantityRecord",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "TextSourceRef": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "kind": {
          "const": "text",
          "title": "Kind",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "path": {
          "title": "Path",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "start_line": {
          "title": "Start Line",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "end_line": {
          "title": "End Line",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "context": {
          "title": "Context",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "kind",
        "path",
        "start_line",
        "end_line",
        "context"
      ],
      "title": "TextSourceRef",
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "stella.literature_hvs_candidates.v6",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "generated_at": {
      "title": "Generated At",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "paper": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/HvsPaper"
    },
    "inputs": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/HvsInputs"
    },
    "extraction": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/HvsExtractionMeta"
    },
    "method_chain": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/MethodStep"
      },
      "title": "Method Chain",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "candidates": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/CandidateRecord"
      },
      "title": "Candidates",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "candidate_groups_considered": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/CandidateGroupConsidered"
      },
      "title": "Candidate Groups Considered",
      "type": "array"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "schema_version",
    "generated_at",
    "paper",
    "inputs",
    "extraction",
    "method_chain",
    "candidates",
    "candidate_groups_considered"
  ],
  "title": "LiteratureHvsCandidatesRecord",
  "type": "object"
}
```
